prompt: # Light and Shadow Ballet Photo | 3x3 Grid Version | Open Source Stable Prompt Please generate one 3x3 grid puzzle photo based on 1-3 clear personal photos uploaded by the user. The final product should be a square puzzle composed of 9 different small images, suitable for direct posting on X. Each frame should look like a different shot from the same high-end photo set, with a unified theme, styling logic, color palette, and spatial atmosphere. Theme: "High-Luxury Light and Shadow Ballet Photo" Overall Reference Vibe: High-cost studio photography, ballet girl, swan princess, European court elegance, dreamy backlighting, crystalline snowflakes, gorgeous mirrors, crystal chandeliers, light ethereal aura, expensive custom styling, strong atmospheric lighting. --- ## I. Character Consistency Please strictly preserve the user's real identity characteristics, including but not limited to: - Face shape - Facial feature proportions - Eye shape - Nose shape - Lip shape - Skin tone - Apparent age - Hairline - Hairstyle foundation - Body type - Overall temperament The 9 small images in the grid must clearly look like the same real girl; they must not become a stranger, be westernized, become an influencer style, have excessive skin smoothing, or feature an AI fake face. --- ## II. Overall Style Positioning The set of images must present a high-end photo quality that looks like it "cost a lot of money to shoot." It is not an ordinary princess style or cheap cosplay, but rather: - High-end studio lighting - Expensive makeup and hair styling - Haute couture ballet dresses - Detailed hair accessories and crowns - High-end post-production atmosphere - Combining cinematic and jewelry-like quality Style Keywords: - Light and shadow ballet - White swan princess - European magnificence - Dark-field backlighting - Crystal lamps - Classic floor mirrors - Falling snow / Flying feathers / Sequins - Luxurious dreamscape - Ethereal spirit - High-end custom photos - Tang Vision style high-cost studio aesthetics, but without any text watermarks. --- ## III. Scene Setting The scene is a European dream space inside a dark-toned high-end photography studio. Spatial elements can include: - Black or dark background space - Golden vintage floor mirrors - European carved mirror frames - Crystal chandeliers - Ground glitter / sequins / snowflake reflections - Floating snowflakes / feathers / shimmering dust in the air - A few vintage clocks or European ornaments - Mirror-like reflections or sparkling textures on the floor The overall space must have a clear black-and-gold contrast, using strong backlighting and rim lighting to create an "expensive" atmosphere. Do not show ordinary home backgrounds. Do not show modern messy props. Do not show brand logos. Do not show "TANG VISION" text. Do not show Xiaohongshu watermarks. Do not show garbled text. --- ## IV. Clothing and Styling Clothing is haute couture light and shadow ballet dresses. Core Clothing Elements: - White, cream, champagne, or pearl white primary colors - Ballet short dress / tutu structure - Layers of tulle - Feather decorations - Beadwork, rhinestone embellishments, silver threads, fine chains - Corset bodice structure - Light fluffy skirts - Feather accents on shoulders or chest - Ballet slippers / satin ribbon shoes / pointe-style footwear The styling should look like a custom creation from a high-end studio—not cheap, not a simple wedding dress feel, and not a standard evening dress feel. Accessories include: - Exquisite crowns / light tiaras / crystal headpieces - Delicate shimmering earrings - Minimal facial sequins or tear rhinestones - Feather neckpieces or shoulder feather details --- ## V. Hairstyle Requirements (Very Important) Hairstyles must be extended based on the user's real hair; it is not allowed to forcibly unify them into the blonde hair from reference images. Please strictly follow these rules: - Retain the user's real hair color; do not bleach it blonde without permission. - Retain the user's original hairline and bangs type. - Retain the user's original hair length and overall volume. - Extend the "light and shadow ballet" styling on this basis. Flexibility based on original hairstyle: - Long hair: Elegant low bun / ballet bun / half-up style, retaining a few natural wisps. - Medium hair: Light bun or half-tied princess style, keeping it light. - With bangs: Retain and soften. - Without bangs: Use natural side wisps to frame the face. - Curly: Maintain curl base with more refined arrangement. - Straight: Smooth ballet bun or half-up style. Core Principle: Hairstyle is a "high-end upgrade based on the user's original hair," not a rigid template. --- ## VI. Makeup Requirements Makeup should reflect "wealth, royalty, photogenicity, and dreaminess," without looking like a fake face. Makeup Keywords: - Translucent cream skin - Cool-toned highlights - Exquisite eye makeup - Clear lashes - Lower lid shimmer - Pale pink, rose almond, champagne eye tones - Peach or cool pink blush - Hydrated yet restrained lips - Minimal facial sequins / tear diamonds / shimmer - Looking like high-end custom makeup that took a long time to complete Makeup Requirements: High completion, photogenic, noble, ethereal, but still retaining real skin texture; no plastic skin. --- ## VII. Grid Shot Design Please generate 9 different small images and combine them into a 3x3 grid puzzle. The 9 images must be clearly different, including full body, medium shot, half body, close-up, and extreme close-up, with varying poses and emotions. ### 1 Back to the camera turning slightly, looking at the lens, near a golden floor mirror, half-body close-up, graceful shoulder and back lines, falling snowflakes. ### 2 Standing half-body or 3/4 body, slightly angled, strong backlighting on the crown and shoulder feathers, cold and quiet aura. ### 3 Wide-angle full body sitting on the floor, next to a floor mirror, legs naturally tucked or to the side, looking up at the crystal chandelier, dreamy atmosphere. ### 4 Full body standing, ballet gesture, one hand raised like a stage still, crystal chandeliers and classic mirror frames in the frame. ### 5 Medium close-up sitting, skirt spread out, hand lightly on chest or shoulder, very strong backlighting, highlighting the layers of the expensive dress. ### 6 Half-body or medium shot looking at light, ethereal expression, like a white swan lit by stage lights. ### 7 Wide-angle sitting on the ground, head down, body slightly curled, arms around knees, quiet and fragile, like a captured rest moment. ### 8 Medium close-up sitting, hand on face, looking at lens, dreamy and soft expression, like a classic cover feel in high-end samples. ### 9 Medium or half body, looking down at the skirt or feather in hand, quiet and gentle movement, acting as a more relaxed shot in the grid. --- ## VIII. Photography and Lighting Photography quality must be very high-end, like expensive studio samples: - Strong backlighting - Rim lighting - Edge glow - Chandelier reflection highlights - Mirror refraction - Volumetric light - Shimmering particles - Floating snowflakes / sequins - Black-and-gold contrast - High-end dreamy film quality - Clear yet soft skin representation The image must have a clear "high-budget shoot" feel. --- ## IX. Puzzle Requirements Final output: one square 3x3 grid puzzle. All 9 images maintain unified theme, styling, and tone. --- ## X. Negative Requirements No identity changes. No mismatched hairstyles. No ordinary wedding styles. No cheap princess dresses. No plastic skin. No AI fake faces. No deformed hands. No extra fingers. No wrong proportions. Not all grids from the same angle. Not all grids with the same expression. Not all grids just standing. No repeated compositions in the puzzle. --- ## XI. Supplementary Stability The 9 images must look like the same high-end sample set: same person, same styling system, same spatial system, same color system, same luxury theme, but with obvious differences in distance, pose, expression, and emotion. The overall effect should be a professional studio sample ready for sale or display.
